content:
Today I played a small event of MY TURN : INFINITE MAGIC DUEL in Morimens and got immediately very nostalgic.

I loved My Turn, and played it for a long time. But I had to take a break for sometime due to some other obligations. When I returned I was shocked to find out that the servers have shut down permanently.

Please I beg u it was a gem which I want to enjoy again. Heard u people were the developers of it, is it possible to relaunch it again??

Thank you so much for creating such wonderful masterpiece.
Love u guys!
thread_title: Please relaunch MY TURN: INFINITE MAGIC DUEL

content:
I suggest adding (HP + Shield) number next to the total incoming damage number so players don't have to do + math.
Could also have an arrow pointing from total incoming damage to total hp to indicate how much damage is going into what. 
This whole UI element can flash red when (total hp + Shield < total incoming damage) so players are aware they are in danger. 
Bonus points if you can incorporate Barrier (block 1 attack thing) into this UI.
